perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Non-live-action graphic video featuring multiple animated grey cat characters with yellow eyes and white hair-like patches on a green and blue gradient background. (2) Transition to a mobile screen recording of the Instagram Story sticker search interface; a keyboard appears and the text 'zonfriends' is typed into the search bar. (3) A grid of various animated stickers featuring the same grey cat and a pink character is displayed, scrolling down to show more options.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and high-pitched electronic background music begins immediately. (2) A female vocal in a friendly and energetic tone speaks in Mandarin, explaining how to find the stickers. (3) The music maintains a constant tempo while the narration continues until the end of the clip.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '想要擁有' (Want to have) - Hook text. (2) 'GD愛貓ZOA貼圖嗎' (GD's cat ZOA stickers?) - Hook text. (3) '只要在IG輸入zonfriends' (Just enter zonfriends on IG) - Functional instruction. (4) '超多可愛的ZOA,A&NE都在這' (So many cute ZOA and A&NE are here) - Descriptive hook.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Mobile Screen Search Tutorial -> Display of Results

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: No real humans are present; the video uses animations and screen recordings.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Animated grey cat characters with yellow eyes, often wearing blue collars or accessories.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts with a digital gradient background (green/blue) and switches to a mobile application interface (Instagram).

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to teach viewers how to access specific animated stickers (ZOA and A&NE) on Instagram by providing the exact search keyword 'zonfriends'. It uses the visual appeal of the characters and a simple screen tutorial to encourage users to use these stickers in their own content.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Promoting the use of specific digital stickers by providing search terms.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Usage of trendy animated characters associated with a celebrity (GD).
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets social media users who enjoy customizing their stories with cute aesthetic stickers.
